raw.advertiser_name: 크랙 - 즉흥 서사 플레이, AI 채팅

hook.summary: An anime-style girl in a suit stands before a split background of ancient ruins and futuristic mechs.
hook.visual_action: The character holds papers and looks directly at the viewer while the background illustrates a timeline from history to the future.

scene_flow: Introduction of an AI-generated anime character in a professional suit.
Visual split-screen effect showing ancient Egyptian-style ruins on the left and futuristic mecha on the right.
Large Korean text overlay appears at the bottom center of the screen.
A call-to-action button fades in at the very bottom to conclude the short loop.
audience_proxy: Young adult males who enjoy anime aesthetics and civilization-building strategy games.
